# Ella funny expressions*Created: Sunday, August 2, 2020 at 5:33:15?PM*<div><h1>Ella funny expressions </h1></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>6yrs July 10 -itŐs been a long time since we locked, but a lot has happened. Ella has transformed into a more control and wonderful, happier more confident child who is incredibly strong and loving, and an amazing big sister who takes care of her little sister like her own. Said a few things today that we knew we had to write down no matter what even though there have been so many more amazing things that she says every day that blows our mind. this is going to be long but worth it. Ella is starting to get more and more friends at school. She is currently in Pinewood Summer Festival of learning going into first grade. This is her first week and she already has homework 30 minutes a day for language arts and math which she can accomplishes tirelessly even after long days until 5 PM never giving up even when itŐs hard. We are so proud of her, she is also growing, which brings us to the story asked me this morning when she was going to school what she should do if a new friend asks to play with her, but she doesnŐt wanna leave her current friends and doesnŐt want to stop playing with them I asked her what she was talking about, and there was a new girl name Natalia at school who will be joining Pinewood in first grade this fall and wanted to play with Ella. Ella told her that she will play with her tomorrow, which is today, and didnŐt know how to handle it. I told her to include her new friend in playing with her current friends. I was so impressed and proud of her when she told me in the evening that she did this and included her friend even though some of her friends said no other said, yes, like Riley Walker, and they proceeded to play together and became friends. I told her that she showed a kindness to the girl that she will never forget, and she did the right thing and me God is very proud of her. After that, she asked me how she will know that, and I told her that she can hear God talking to her and her head. She proceeded to pretend to call him by holding her fingers up to her ear and mouth and calling God. When she finally reached him, she said oh OK God, you are busy right now talking to someone else I will wait for you. And then let me know mom, God is busy talking to someone else right now so IŐm just going to wait for him to finish, after that, Ella after that got answered the phone and Ella said a few things to him and then asked if he wants to speak with her mommy. I said thank you so much and it is the biggest gift that I couldŐve had and IŐve always wanted to speak with him and thank him for my wonderful life and his love. after we hung up the phone, Ella asked me are you going to thank me for introducing you to God? And I told her her, yes thank you. You introduced me to God the first day that you were born. It was a very special moment for both of us. I will try to log more. <br></li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>2 years 3 months: When Ella asked me to read Winnie the Pooh today I agreed. So I was told ŇMama, good boyyyyÓ. And patted on the head</li>
<li>In the car Ella screamed - MAMA!!!!! Yes? Hai! Hi! PAPA!!!!!! Yes? Hai! Hi Ella! MAMA!!!!!! And so on...</li>
<li>8/14 Ella said bless you!</li>
<li>Says mhmmm 8/17</li>
<li>Starts to count with 3 not 1 8/17</li>
<li>8/26  I was sitting with Ella eating lunch on our first day of vacation during covid and she looked at me and hugged me and said Mama I love you and kissed me and then said it again - I cried ! </li>
<li>9/7/20 2 yr 4 mo this morning on the last day of vacation at dacha as we were eating breakfast pancakes Ella was in an especially good mood and said I love you mama good boy mwah and then said papa I love you too and went on to repeat this multiple times. You can assume that our hearts were melted and we let her do whatever she wanted after this. Later in the day she asked us about the difference between a good boy and a good girl. And when we explained good boy vs girl she asked about Mama papa Galya vova Ira borya lala luda afaf maya and whether each of them were boys and girls. I then showed her photos of her great grandparents Anya Vera and Lazar and she memorized who they were and learned that she was named after Ania and Lazar. We placed their photos on our mantle and will place Leonyas family photos as well. Then she asked what a plane was when she saw it in the sky. She is getting very curious about things and has also counted from 1-10 in russian and in English on her own when we put her down to sleep at night. It is fascinating how her mind works. She also reads her ABCs almost unaided at this age!<br></li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>4yrs - hug and kiss! Mmmmmmwah! Eeeeeya! ŇEeeyaÓ is the sound you make when you give a big hug. <br></li>
<li>4yr 8 mo - I have to turn my pillow again. How many times do I need to turn my pillow? 6 times? 7 times? if I do that I might be crazy tomorrow like a chicken rooster.<br></li>
</ul>
<div><br><br></div>
<div><br><br></div>
<ul>
<li>2yr 11 months. After I gave Ella a little pedicure and we took a bubble bath together she sat in my lap, help me tight and said ŇEto maya mamaÓ and right when I thought my heart couldnŐt melt anymore she said Ňvsya maya MamaÓ ??????????????????</li>
<li>3 yr 10 months - ellochka said to me - ti mayo solnoshka- very solnoshka and the moon</li>
<li>Today we learned vaccine is coming in February for kids under 5. Daddy said, Ella vaccine is coming yay! Ella said, yay! ??? ????? ?? ???? ???????<br></li>
<li>3 yr 10 no - am I part of this family Mamochka? Yes. Then we is no one talking to me?<br></li>
<li>4yr 5 mo<br></li>
<ul>
<li>WhatŐs the ring finger called? Galya</li>
<li>Ella, confidently - Ňpost pinkyÓ<br></li>
<li>I reeenbr just a little bit when I was a baby. I remember swimming in the turtle pool and playing in the kitchen with fruits (Mitchell park library)<br></li>
<li>Mommy I love you so much I want to say it all the time. I love you more than the moon and the stars and the world. <br></li>
<li>Mommy, is today tomorrow? <br></li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div>First love letter ? from Dillon in 4s class. 4yr 5mo</div>

<ul>
<li>12/9/22 is the narrator tired yet? While watching. Equity and the beast. <br></li>
</ul>
<div>1/11/23: First kindergarten assessment at challenger. Ella wanted to bring the teacher a flower. </div>
